text: I lost my voice. I can't believe it. It actually happened. We won. We won. It's crazy, man. Like we waited 24 years for this. Come on, 24 years, and we invented the game. We invented the sport. Proud of my Toronto friends, my Toronto brothers. I'm proud of Canada. This this is huge for every young kid who aspire to be basketball players or future pro. This is the this is this is what it is. This is the biggest moment in basketball history for Canada, and you know we all get to enjoy it here in Halifax. It's nice to see everyone come together, celebrate something.
